title: Coverage, Thresholds, and Meaningful Evidence · Gate Lens: Coverage Review
summary: Set coverage policy that exposes risk without encouraging empty tests. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates coverage review increment in a changed-code coverage and exception policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pair coverage gaps with mutation, defect, and risk evidence.
Prevent new untested behavior while ratcheting legacy coverage.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Predict Coverage Review
steps.instruction:
theory case — Use a changed theory case for gates coverage that tests this competency: defend the module contract. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Coverage Review contract for the supplied data.

options.text: The highest-coverage test suite is automatically best. This does not resolve predict coverage review.

For predict coverage review, apply Coverage Review without its stated preconditions, omit the a changed-code coverage and exception policy trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Coverage Review for a changed-code coverage and exception policy.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: The highest-coverage test suite is automatically best. This fails the Coverage Review contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

steps.title: Build Coverage Review evidence
steps.instruction: Append a gates-coverage-review-1f3v3r: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Coverage Review into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-coverage-review-1f3v3r:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Coverage Review structural check is only one gate. a changed-code coverage and exception policy must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Pair coverage gaps with mutation, defect, and risk evidence.
